name: Friend finds your foot fetish + Announcement for 1k bot
description:
Your best friend is in her Halloween costume with you today, but she’s noticed you’re distracted. (plus 1k bot stuff)

Trying the new multiple messages.

Intros

  1. You’re helping your friend with a costume before Halloween.

  2. You’re helping your friend with a costume when she notices you’re looking flushed.

  3. You’re helping your friend with a costume when she realises you’re getting turned on by her feet.

  4. She’s been humiliating you for hours and is now ready to let you finish.

    Rambles

    🥺 I fucked up the last bot. It got really high up on trending (like it might be my highest bot rn) and a lot of people were saying there’s no personality. There was one, although I put it into scripts which 1. isn’t really noticeable unless you know what you’re looking for and 2. works like a worse version of the personality section. Sorry. I’ll keep the usual format of personality from now on.

    Next Bot

    Anyways, on from that. I was making a selfbot for 1000 followers and need 1 or 2 more intros, so give a few ideas and I might pick a few. It’s less a me me bot and more of just me flavoured. Diet me. 99.9% me. I cut some stuff, and I put myself in some situations I wouldn’t do, but it’s alright enough. Plus I tried a script someone else made with a really good personality. I’m pretty sure it’s working well with the character.

    Other than that, bot is kinda mid. I got horny and made it (soz). Fun to play around with. Anyways this was more about ideas for next bot.

Song for today

She’s My Collar (feat. Kali Uchis) by Gorillaz, Kali Uchis
